name: Mai Tai
instructions:
Combine ingredients in shaker. 
Shake for 10 - 15 secs
Pour over crushed ice
Garnish with mint

instructions:
1.  Add all ingredients to a shaker with crushed ice.
2.  Shake hard for 8脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗垄脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聙脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聯10 seconds.

4.  Top with more crushed ice if needed.
5.  Garnish with a pineapple wedge, mint sprig, and a cherry. A dusting of nutmeg on top is traditional.
If you want it lighter and more refreshing, skip the cream of coconut and use 1 oz coconut water instead, then serve over pebble ice.

name: Blue Hawaiian

name: Lemon Drop Martini
instructions:
1
Sugar the rim: Rub a lemon wedge around the rim of a chilled martini glass, then dip the rim in 1 tablespoons sugar (for rim) to coat. Set aside.
2
Shake: Combine 2 fluid ounces citrus vodka (or plain vodka), 0.8 fluid ounces fresh lemon juice, 0.5 fluid ounces triple sec or Cointreau, and 0.5 fluid ounces simple syrup in a cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake vigorously for about 15 seconds 
00:15
.
3
Strain & garnish: Strain into the prepared glass. Garnish with 1 pieces lemon wheel or twist (for garnish).

name: Gin Martini
instructions:
chill glass
shake ingredients in shaker with ice.
strain into chilled glass.

name: Pain Killer
instructions:
Add dark rum, pineapple juice, orange juice, cream of coconut, and ice to a cocktail shaker. Shake until the cocktail mixture is chilled and frothy.
Fill a cocktail glass with crushed ice. Strain the cocktail mixture into glass. Sprinkle with fresh ground nutmeg, If desired, garnish with an orange slice, pineapple slice and pineapple fronds.

name: Suffering Bastard
instructions:
Add the bourbon, gin, lime juice and bitters into a shaker with ice and shake until well-chilled (about 30 seconds).

Strain into a Collins glass over fresh ice.

Top with the ginger beer.

Garnish with a mint sprig.

name: Old Fashioned
instructions:
in a glass muddle sweetener/sugar and bitters.
Add ice
pour whiskey over ice and stir

name: Jungle Bird
instructions:
Add the rum, Campari, pineapple juice, lime juice, and demerara syrup into a shaker with ice and shake until well-chilled.

Strain into a rocks glass over fresh ice.

Garnish with a pineapple wedge.

name: Zombie
instructions: Add all ingredients to mixing tin. Flash blend or shake with crushed/pebble ice. Dirty dump into favorite Zombie glass, or double old fashioned or Collins glass. Top with ice, if needed. Garnish with mint sprig.

name: Cosmo
instructions:
Put ingredients in a shaker with ice
Shake to combine
Pour into a chilled glass
